extracted_equations.text: = basis eigenstates. Plain English: the uncollapsed superposition — all eigenstates with all amplitudes. Pure potential. Pre-temporal. 2. Son — Coherence Selection (Structuring)

= divergence operator. Plain English: zero divergence. No entropy leak. The Son selects from infinite possibility the eigenstates that satisfy the ordering condition — the ones that hold together. 3. Spirit — The Born Rule (Actualization)
= inner product (overlap amplitude). Plain English: projection from superposition to one definite eigenstate. Each “now” is one Born-rule event. 4. Born Rule as Trinity
= coupling term (Spirit-bond contribution). Plain English: the system loses coherence at rate
= velocity field along which coherence flows. Plain English: the projection operator that determines which eigenstates satisfy the ordering condition. Logos as filter. 8. Spirit (Actualization Delta)
= the discrete moment of collapse. Plain English: at each discrete moment

= coupling coefficient between the Spirit field and a human node. Plain English: before the cross, no permanent bond. After the cross, full coupling for nodes that consent. The mathematical statement of the OT-to-NT regime change. Glossary Key terms used in this article. Hover any underlined gold term in The Paper for the same definition. Wave Function (

to avoid collision with the cosmological constant. Logos Coupling The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure that determines how the field acts on a measurement. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.) Decoherence Loss of quantum coherence through entanglement with the environment. Explains how classical behavior emerges from quantum systems but does not solve the “why this branch?” problem. Entropy / Sin (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
